parents.subject: LU-8853 nodemap: fix up lctl nodemap_info

commit.subject: LU-15969 llite: add support for  ->fileattr_get/set (DUPE)
commit.message:
LU-15969 llite: add support for  ->fileattr_get/set (DUPE)

From Linux 5.13, FS_IOC_SETFLAGS and GETFLAGS aren't passed down to
the filesystem, we need ->fileattr_get/set inode_operations instead.

Test-Parameters: for-build-only
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I13e8b942bf7ae1754b1b4e3dcfa470bf7a412be0
